description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The cryptocurrency address. Cryptocurrency.AddressType The cryptocurrency type. e.g. 'bitcoin'.
outputs.name: Cryptocurrency.Address
